title: PUBLISH_HPKE_KEY accepts all-zero (low-order) X25519 public key
description: relay/src/ws.rs:1100 validates public_key is 32 bytes but does not check for the all-zero value. An X25519 all-zero key is a degenerate low-order point: the shared secret for any DH exchange with it is also all-zero, meaning any HPKE ciphertext encrypted to this key is trivially compromised. A malicious user can register this key. Fix: reject if params.public_key.iter().all(|b| *b == 0), returning INVALID_REQUEST. Optionally also reject the full set of 7 small-subgroup points from RFC 7748 §6.1.
